`src/dma_handler.cpp`:

```cpp
#include "dma_handler.h"
#include "offsets.h"
#include <iostream>

DMAHandler::DMAHandler() : connected(false), hVMM(nullptr), pid(0), baseAddress(0) {}

DMAHandler::~DMAHandler() {
    if (hVMM) {
        VMMDLL_Close(hVMM);
        hVMM = nullptr;
    }
}

bool DMAHandler::Initialize() {
    std::cout << "[DMA] Initializing..." << std::endl;
    
    LPSTR argv[] = { (LPSTR)"", (LPSTR)"-device", (LPSTR)"fpga", (LPSTR)"-v" };
    hVMM = VMMDLL_Initialize(4, (LPCSTR*)argv);
    
    if (!hVMM) {
        std::cout << "[DMA] Failed to initialize VMMDLL. Trying default..." << std::endl;
        hVMM = VMMDLL_Initialize(0, nullptr);
    }

    if (hVMM) {
        connected = true;
        std::cout << "[DMA] VMMDLL Initialized." << std::endl;
        
        if (GetProcessID("PioneerGame.exe")) {
            std::cout << "[DMA] Found Process ID: " << pid << std::endl;
            baseAddress = GetModuleBase("PioneerGame.exe");
            std::cout << "[DMA] Base Address: 0x" << std::hex << baseAddress << std::dec << std::endl;
            return true;
        } else {
            std::cerr << "[DMA] Failed to find process PioneerGame.exe" << std::endl;
        }
    } else {
        std::cerr << "[DMA] Failed to connect to DMA device." << std::endl;
    }
    return false;
}

bool DMAHandler::ReadMemory(uint64_t address, void* buffer, size_t size) {
    if (!connected || !hVMM || !pid) return false;
    return VMMDLL_MemReadEx(hVMM, pid, address, (PBYTE)buffer, size, nullptr, VMMDLL_FLAG_NOCACHE);
}

bool DMAHandler::GetProcessID(const std::string& processName) {
    return VMMDLL_PidGetFromName(hVMM, (LPSTR)processName.c_str(), (PDWORD)&pid);
}

uint64_t DMAHandler::GetModuleBase(const std::string& moduleName) {
    return VMMDLL_ProcessGetModuleBaseU(hVMM, pid, (LPSTR)moduleName.c_str());
}

uint64_t DMAHandler::GetBaseAddress() {
    return baseAddress;
}

uint64_t DMAHandler::GetBaseSize(const std::string& moduleName) {
    if (!connected || !hVMM || !pid) return 0;
    
    PVMMDLL_MAP_MODULEENTRY pModuleEntry = nullptr;
    if (VMMDLL_Map_GetModuleFromNameU(hVMM, pid, (LPSTR)moduleName.c_str(), &pModuleEntry, 0)) {
        uint64_t size = pModuleEntry->cbImageSize;
        VMMDLL_MemFree(pModuleEntry);
        return size;
    }
    return 0;
}

std::vector<PlayerData> DMAHandler::GetPlayers() {
    std::vector<PlayerData> players;
    if (!connected) return players;

    // Logic to traverse GWorld -> Level -> Actors
    // This is where you use the offsets from offsets.h
    
    // Mock data for demonstration
    PlayerData p1;
    p1.name = "Enemy1";
    p1.position = { 100.0f, 200.0f, 0.0f };
    p1.health = 100.0f;
    p1.isLocal = false;
    players.push_back(p1);

    PlayerData local;
    local.name = "Me";
    local.position = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f };
    local.health = 100.0f;
    local.isLocal = true;
    players.push_back(local);
    
    return players;
}

```

`src/dma_handler.h`:

```h
#pragma once
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include "game_data.h"
#include <windows.h>

// Fix for MinGW/GCC missing SAL annotations
#ifndef _Check_return_opt_
#define _Check_return_opt_
#endif
#ifndef _In_z_
#define _In_z_
#endif
#ifndef _Printf_format_string_
#define _Printf_format_string_
#endif

#include "vmmdll.h"

class DMAHandler {
public:
    DMAHandler();
    ~DMAHandler();

    bool Initialize();
    bool ReadMemory(uint64_t address, void* buffer, size_t size);
    
    // Wrapper for compatibility with emu.cpp
    bool Read(uint64_t address, void* buffer, size_t size) {
        return ReadMemory(address, buffer, size);
    }

    template<typename T>
    T Read(uint64_t address) {
        T buffer;
        if (ReadMemory(address, &buffer, sizeof(T)))
            return buffer;
        return T();
    }

    uint64_t GetBaseAddress();
    uint64_t GetBaseSize(const std::string& moduleName);
    std::vector<PlayerData> GetPlayers();

private:
    bool connected;
    VMM_HANDLE hVMM;
    uint32_t pid;
    uint64_t baseAddress;
    
    bool GetProcessID(const std::string& processName);
    uint64_t GetModuleBase(const std::string& moduleName);
};

```

`src/emu.cpp`:

```cpp
// emu.cpp
#include "pch.h"
#include "dma_handler.h"

#include <unicorn/unicorn.h>
#include <unicorn/platform.h>

// ---------------------------------------------------------
// Externs from other translation units
// ---------------------------------------------------------

struct TArray
{
    uintptr_t data;
    int32_t count;
    int32_t max;
};

extern DMAHandler mem;

// target_base is set in main.cpp after mem.Init + GetBaseDaddy
namespace globals
{
    extern uint64_t target_base;
}

// small helper
static inline bool IsCanonicalUserPtr(uint64_t p)
{
    if (!p) return false;
    if (p >= 0xFFFF800000000000ull) return false; // rough kernel filter
    return true;
}

static bool VerifyUWorldCandidate(const char* name, uint64_t uworld)
{
    (void)name;

    if (!IsCanonicalUserPtr(uworld))
        return false;

    uint64_t persistentLevel = 0;
    if (!mem.Read(uworld + 0xE8, &persistentLevel, sizeof(persistentLevel)))
        return false;

    if (!IsCanonicalUserPtr(persistentLevel))
        return false;

    uint64_t owningWorld = 0;
    if (!mem.Read(persistentLevel + 0xE8, &owningWorld, sizeof(owningWorld)))
        return false;

    if (owningWorld != uworld)
        return false;

    return true;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------
// emu namespace: Unicorn engine and stack config
// ---------------------------------------------------------
namespace emu
{
    uc_engine* uc = nullptr;

    // Virtual stack region inside Unicorn (does not touch the real process)
    const uint64_t STACK_BASE = 0x0000000080000000ull;
    const uint64_t STACK_SIZE = 0x00200000ull; // 2 MB

    bool Init();

    void Reset()
    {
        if (uc)
        {
            uc_close(uc);
            uc = nullptr;
        }
    }
}

// Global invalid memory hook
static uc_hook gInvalidMemHook = 0;

// Helper: page-align down
static inline uint64_t PageAlign(uint64_t addr)
{
    return addr & ~0xFFFULL;
}

// Invalid memory callback: map the missing page from real process
static bool hook_mem_invalid(
    uc_engine* uc,
    uc_mem_type type,
    uint64_t address,
    int size,
    int64_t value,
    void* user_data)
{
    (void)uc;
    (void)user_data;
    (void)value;
    (void)type;
    (void)size;

    uint64_t rip = 0;
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RIP, &rip);

    // Page-align and map a single page from the real game
    const uint64_t pageBase = PageAlign(address);
    uint8_t buf[0x1000]{};

    // Try to read the real page via DMA. If it fails, we map zeros.
    if (!mem.Read(pageBase, buf, sizeof(buf)))
    {
        std::cout << "[UC] mem.Read failed for 0x"
            << std::hex << pageBase << std::dec
            << ", mapping zero page\n";
    }

    // Map page in Unicorn (ignore "already mapped" error)
    uc_err err = uc_mem_map(emu::uc,
        pageBase,
        0x1000,
        UC_PROT_READ | UC_PROT_WRITE | UC_PROT_EXEC);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK && err != UC_ERR_MAP)
    {
        std::cout << "[UC] uc_mem_map(0x"
            << std::hex << pageBase << ") failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << "\n";
        return false;
    }

    // Write the page contents (or zeros if mem.Read failed)
    err = uc_mem_write(emu::uc, pageBase, buf, sizeof(buf));
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[UC] uc_mem_write(0x"
            << std::hex << pageBase << ") failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << "\n";
        return false;
    }

    // Returning true tells Unicorn "retry this access now that memory exists"
    return true;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------
// Minimal TEB stub; replace with your proper GS/TEB setup if needed
// ---------------------------------------------------------
void set_teb()
{
    // If game code uses GS-based TLS/TEB, set UC_X86_REG_GS and map a fake TEB here.
    // For now, this is a no-op stub.
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------
// Map a region around a heap pointer (e.g. GWorld) into Unicorn
// ---------------------------------------------------------
static bool MapHeapRegionForPointer(uint64_t ptr, size_t bytes)
{
    if (!ptr || !bytes) return false;

    auto page_align = [](uint64_t addr) -> uint64_t {
        return addr & ~0xFFFull;
    };

    const uint64_t start = page_align(ptr);
    const uint64_t end = page_align(ptr + bytes - 1) + 0x1000;

    std::vector<uint8_t> buf(0x1000);

    for (uint64_t addr = start; addr < end; addr += 0x1000)
    {
        uc_err err = uc_mem_map(emu::uc, addr, 0x1000, UC_PROT_READ | UC_PROT_WRITE);
        if (err != UC_ERR_OK && err != UC_ERR_MAP)
        {
            // not fatal; some pages might not be needed
        }

        if (!mem.Read(addr, buf.data(), 0x1000))
        {
            continue;
        }

        err = uc_mem_write(emu::uc, addr, buf.data(), 0x1000);
        if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
        {
            // non-fatal for non-essential pages
        }
    }

    return true;
}

// You must set this to your actual exe name (same as in main.cpp)
static const char* kProcessName = "PioneerGame.exe";

bool emu::Init()
{
    if (uc)
        return true;

    if (globals::target_base == 0)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] globals::target_base is 0. Set it before calling Init().\n";
        return false;
    }

    uc_err err = uc_open(UC_ARCH_X86, UC_MODE_64, &uc);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] uc_open failed: " << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        uc = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    // install invalid memory hook BEFORE running any code
    err = uc_hook_add(
        uc,
        &gInvalidMemHook,
        UC_HOOK_MEM_READ_UNMAPPED |
        UC_HOOK_MEM_WRITE_UNMAPPED |
        UC_HOOK_MEM_FETCH_UNMAPPED,
        (void*)hook_mem_invalid,
        nullptr,
        1, 0 // whole address space
    );
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] uc_hook_add invalid-mem failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        uc_close(uc);
        uc = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    // stack
    err = uc_mem_map(uc, STACK_BASE, STACK_SIZE, UC_PROT_READ | UC_PROT_WRITE);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] uc_mem_map stack failed: " << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        uc_close(uc);
        uc = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    // module size from DMA
    size_t moduleSize = mem.GetBaseSize(kProcessName);
    if (!moduleSize)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] GetBaseSize failed for " << kProcessName << "\n";
        uc_close(uc);
        uc = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    const uint64_t base = globals::target_base;
    const uint64_t end = base + moduleSize;

    // map whole module region as RWX
    err = uc_mem_map(uc, base, moduleSize, UC_PROT_READ | UC_PROT_WRITE | UC_PROT_EXEC);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[emu::Init] uc_mem_map module failed: " << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        uc_close(uc);
        uc = nullptr;
        return false;
    }

    auto page_align = [](uint64_t addr) -> uint64_t
    {
        return addr & ~0xFFFull;
    };

    // Required pages: decrypt stubs for GWorld, GameInstance, CameraManager, Bone
    const uint64_t page_gworld = page_align(base + 0x4F80DFC); // GWorld stub
    const uint64_t page_gi = page_align(base + 0x2A5891F); // GameInstance stub
    const uint64_t page_cam = page_align(base + 0x2A66AE9); // CameraManager stub
    const uint64_t page_bone = page_align(base + 0x3076D50); // BoneDecrypt stub

    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(0x1000);
    bool warnedOptional = false;

    for (uint64_t addr = base; addr < end; addr += 0x1000)
    {
        size_t toRead = 0x1000;
        if (addr + toRead > end)
            toRead = static_cast<size_t>(end - addr);

        bool requiredPage =
            (addr == page_gworld ||
             addr == page_gi ||
             addr == page_cam ||
             addr == page_bone);

        if (!mem.Read(addr, buffer.data(), toRead))
        {
            if (requiredPage)
            {
                std::cout << "[emu::Init] FATAL: mem.Read failed for required decrypt page at 0x"
                    << std::hex << addr << std::dec << "\n";
                uc_close(uc);
                uc = nullptr;
                return false;
            }
            else
            {
                if (!warnedOptional)
                {
                    warnedOptional = true;
                }
                continue;
            }
        }

        err = uc_mem_write(uc, addr, buffer.data(), toRead);
        if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
        {
            if (requiredPage)
            {
                std::cout << "[emu::Init] FATAL: uc_mem_write failed for required decrypt page at 0x"
                    << std::hex << addr << " err=" << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << "\n";
                uc_close(uc);
                uc = nullptr;
                return false;
            }
            else
            {
                if (!warnedOptional)
                {
                    std::cout << "[emu::Init] uc_mem_write failed for some non-critical pages (suppressing spam)\n";
                    warnedOptional = true;
                }
                continue;
            }
        }
    }

    std::cout << "[emu::Init] Unicorn initialized, module mapped.\n";
    return true;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------
// Decrypt functions
// ---------------------------------------------------------
//
// GWorld: RVA 0x4F80DFC .. 0x4F80EF4, result in one of the regs
// GameInstance: RVA 0x2A5891F .. 0x2A58953, RCX = GWorld, result in XMM0
// CameraManager:RVA 0x2A66AE9 .. 0x2A66BF9, RAX = PlayerController, result in RAX
// BoneBase: RVA 0x3076D50 .. 0x3076E64, RCX = Mesh, result in RAX
//
uint64_t GetDecryptedGWorld()
{
    if (!emu::Init())
        return 0;

    const uint64_t decrypt_start = globals::target_base + 0x4F80DFC;
    const uint64_t decrypt_end = globals::target_base + 0x4F80EF4;

    uint64_t rsp_val = emu::STACK_BASE + emu::STACK_SIZE - 0x1000;
    uc_err err = uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RSP, &rsp_val);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedGWorld] uc_reg_write RSP failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    set_teb();

    err = uc_emu_start(
        emu::uc,
        decrypt_start,
        decrypt_end,
        0,
        0
    );

    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        uint64_t rip = 0;
        uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RIP, &rip);
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedGWorld] uc_emu_start failed, RIP=0x"
            << std::hex << rip << " err=" << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    uint64_t rax = 0, rbx = 0, rcx = 0, rdx = 0, rsi = 0, rdi = 0, r8 = 0;
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RAX, &rax);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RBX, &rbx);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RCX, &rcx);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RDX, &rdx);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RSI, &rsi);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RDI, &rdi);
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_R8, &r8);

    struct Cand { const char* name; uint64_t val; } cands[] = {
        { "RCX", rcx },
        { "RAX", rax },
        { "RBX", rbx },
        { "RDX", rdx },
        { "RSI", rsi },
        { "RDI", rdi },
        { "R8", r8 },
    };

    for (auto& c : cands)
    {
        if (!c.val) continue;
        if (VerifyUWorldCandidate(c.name, c.val))
            return c.val;
    }

    std::cout << "[GetDecryptedGWorld] No valid UWorld candidate found. Range is probably wrong.\n";
    return 0;
}

uint64_t GetDecryptedGameInstance(uint64_t GWorld)
{
    if (!GWorld)
        return 0;

    if (!emu::Init())
        return 0;

    MapHeapRegionForPointer(GWorld, 0x8000);

    const uint64_t decrypt_start = globals::target_base + 0x2A5891F;
    const uint64_t decrypt_end = globals::target_base + 0x2A58953;

    uint64_t rsp_val = emu::STACK_BASE + emu::STACK_SIZE - 0x1000;
    uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RSP, &rsp_val);

    uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RCX, &GWorld);

    set_teb();

    uc_err err = uc_emu_start(
        emu::uc,
        decrypt_start,
        decrypt_end,
        0,
        0
    );

    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        uint64_t rip = 0;
        uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RIP, &rip);
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedGameInstance] emu failed (RIP: 0x"
            << std::hex << rip << ", err: " << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << ")\n";
        return 0;
    }

    struct XMM
    {
        uint64_t lo;
        uint64_t hi;
    };

    XMM xmm0{};
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_XMM0, &xmm0);

    uint64_t gi = xmm0.lo;

    if (!IsCanonicalUserPtr(gi))
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedGameInstance] non-canonical GI 0x"
            << std::hex << gi << std::dec << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    TArray lp{};
    if (!mem.Read(gi + 0x140, &lp, sizeof(lp)))
    {
        return 0;
    }

    return gi;
}

uint64_t GetDecryptedCameraManager(uint64_t PlayerController)
{
    if (!PlayerController)
        return 0;

    if (!emu::Init())
        return 0;

    MapHeapRegionForPointer(PlayerController, 0x4000);

    const uint64_t decrypt_start = globals::target_base + 0x2A66AE9;
    const uint64_t decrypt_end = globals::target_base + 0x2A66BF9;

    uint64_t rsp_val = emu::STACK_BASE + emu::STACK_SIZE - 0x1000;
    uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RSP, &rsp_val);

    uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RAX, &PlayerController);

    set_teb();

    uc_err err = uc_emu_start(
        emu::uc,
        decrypt_start,
        decrypt_end,
        0,
        0
    );

    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        uint64_t rip = 0;
        uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RIP, &rip);
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedCameraManager] emu failed (RIP: 0x"
            << std::hex << rip << ", err: " << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << ")\n";
        return 0;
    }

    uint64_t cam = 0;
    uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RAX, &cam);

    if (!IsCanonicalUserPtr(cam))
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedCameraManager] non-canonical CameraManager 0x"
            << std::hex << cam << std::dec << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    return cam;
}

uint64_t GetDecryptedBoneBase(uint64_t mesh)
{
    if (!mesh)
        return 0;

    if (!emu::Init())
        return 0;

    MapHeapRegionForPointer(mesh, 0x4000);

    const uint64_t decrypt_start = globals::target_base + 0x3076D50;
    const uint64_t decrypt_end = globals::target_base + 0x3076E64;

    uint64_t rsp_val = emu::STACK_BASE + emu::STACK_SIZE - 0x1000;
    uc_err err = uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RSP, &rsp_val);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedBoneBase] uc_reg_write RSP failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    err = uc_reg_write(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RCX, &mesh);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedBoneBase] uc_reg_write RCX failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    set_teb();

    err = uc_emu_start(
        emu::uc,
        decrypt_start,
        decrypt_end,
        0,
        0
    );

    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        uint64_t rip = 0;
        uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RIP, &rip);
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedBoneBase] emu failed (RIP: 0x"
            << std::hex << rip << ", err: " << uc_strerror(err) << std::dec << ")\n";
        return 0;
    }

    uint64_t boneBase = 0;
    err = uc_reg_read(emu::uc, UC_X86_REG_RAX, &boneBase);
    if (err != UC_ERR_OK)
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedBoneBase] uc_reg_read RAX failed: "
            << uc_strerror(err) << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    if (!IsCanonicalUserPtr(boneBase))
    {
        std::cout << "[GetDecryptedBoneBase] non-canonical bone base 0x"
            << std::hex << boneBase << std::dec << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    return boneBase;
}
```

`src/emu.h`:

```h
#pragma once
#include <cstdint>
#include <unicorn/unicorn.h>

// Decrypt functions using Unicorn emulator
uint64_t GetDecryptedGWorld();
uint64_t GetDecryptedGameInstance(uint64_t GWorld);
uint64_t GetDecryptedCameraManager(uint64_t PlayerController);
uint64_t GetDecryptedBoneBase(uint64_t mesh);

namespace emu
{
    extern uc_engine* uc;
    extern const uint64_t STACK_BASE;
    extern const uint64_t STACK_SIZE;
    
    bool Init();
    void Reset();
}
```

`src/main.cpp`:

```cpp
#include "pch.h"
#include <iostream>
#include <thread>
#include <chrono>
#include "dma_handler.h"
#include "emu.h"
#include "offsets.h"

// Global memory instance
DMAHandler mem;

namespace globals
{
    uint64_t target_base = 0;
}

static const char* kProcessName = "PioneerGame.exe";

int main()
{
    std::cout << "Arc Raiders Poor Man's Radar (DMA)" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Credits: yurigagarin, Omdihar, bastok" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "========================================" << std::endl;

    // Initialize DMA
    if (!mem.Initialize())
    {
        std::cerr << "Failed to initialize DMA." << std::endl;
        return 1;
    }

    // Get base address
    globals::target_base = mem.GetBaseAddress();
    if (!globals::target_base)
    {
        std::cerr << "Failed to get base address for " << kProcessName << std::endl;
        return 1;
    }
    std::cout << "[Main] Base address: 0x" << std::hex << globals::target_base << std::dec << std::endl;

    // Initialize Unicorn emulator
    if (!emu::Init())
    {
        std::cerr << "Failed to initialize Unicorn emulator." << std::endl;
        return 1;
    }

    // Main loop
    while (true)
    {
        // Decrypt GWorld
        uint64_t gWorld = GetDecryptedGWorld();
        if (!gWorld)
        {
            std::cout << "[Main] Failed to get GWorld, retrying..." << std::endl;
            std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::seconds(1));
            continue;
        }

        // Decrypt GameInstance
        uint64_t gameInstance = GetDecryptedGameInstance(gWorld);
        if (!gameInstance)
        {
            std::cout << "[Main] Failed to get GameInstance" << std::endl;
        }

        std::cout << "[Main] GWorld: 0x" << std::hex << gWorld
                  << " GameInstance: 0x" << gameInstance << std::dec << std::endl;

        // TODO: Add radar rendering logic here
        // - Get LocalPlayer and LocalPawn
        // - Iterate actors to find other players
        // - Calculate relative positions
        // - Render radar overlay

        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));
    }

    emu::Reset();
    return 0;
}

```

`src/offsets.h`:

```h
#pragma once
#include <cstdint>

namespace Offsets {
    // These offsets are from the original Poor Man's Radar source
    // Updated as of December 8, 2025
    // You need to update these when the game patches
    
    // Decrypt RVA ranges (for Unicorn emulation)
    namespace Decrypt {
        // GWorld: RVA 0x4F80DFC .. 0x4F80EF4, result in one of the regs
        constexpr uint64_t GWorld_Start = 0x4F80DFC;
        constexpr uint64_t GWorld_End = 0x4F80EF4;
        
        // GameInstance: RVA 0x2A5891F .. 0x2A58953, RCX = GWorld, result in XMM0
        constexpr uint64_t GameInstance_Start = 0x2A5891F;
        constexpr uint64_t GameInstance_End = 0x2A58953;
        
        // CameraManager: RVA 0x2A66AE9 .. 0x2A66BF9, RAX = PlayerController, result in RAX
        constexpr uint64_t CameraManager_Start = 0x2A66AE9;
        constexpr uint64_t CameraManager_End = 0x2A66BF9;
        
        // BoneBase: RVA 0x3076D50 .. 0x3076E64, RCX = Mesh, result in RAX
        constexpr uint64_t BoneBase_Start = 0x3076D50;
        constexpr uint64_t BoneBase_End = 0x3076E64;
    }
    
    namespace UWorld {
        constexpr uint64_t PersistentLevel = 0xE8;
        constexpr uint64_t OwningGameInstance = 0xE8; // In ULevel, points back to UWorld
    }

    namespace UGameInstance {
        constexpr uint64_t LocalPlayers = 0x140;
    }

    namespace ULevel {
        constexpr uint64_t Actors = 0x98;
        constexpr uint64_t ActorsCount = 0xA0;
    }

    namespace UPlayer {
        constexpr uint64_t PlayerController = 0x30;
    }

    namespace APlayerController {
        constexpr uint64_t AcknowledgedPawn = 0x2A0;
        constexpr uint64_t PlayerCameraManager = 0x2D0;
    }

    namespace APawn {
        constexpr uint64_t PlayerState = 0x240;
        constexpr uint64_t RootComponent = 0x130;
    }

    namespace USceneComponent {
        constexpr uint64_t RelativeLocation = 0x11C; // FVector
    }
}

```

`src/radar.cpp`:

```cpp
#include "radar.h"
#include <iostream>
#include <cmath>

Radar::Radar() {}

void Radar::Render(const std::vector<PlayerData>& players) {
    // In a real application, this would render to an overlay window using ImGui or similar.
    // For this scaffold, we will just print the relative positions to the console.

    Vector3 localPos = { 0, 0, 0 };
    for (const auto& p : players) {
        if (p.isLocal) {
            localPos = p.position;
            break;
        }
    }

    std::cout << "\n--- Radar Update ---" << std::endl;
    for (const auto& p : players) {
        if (p.isLocal) continue;

        float dx = p.position.x - localPos.x;
        float dy = p.position.y - localPos.y;
        float dist = std::sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);

        std::cout << "Player: " << p.name << " | Dist: " << dist << "m | RelPos: (" << dx << ", " << dy << ")" << std::endl;
    }
    std::cout << "--------------------" << std::endl;
}

```
